# test

Run .ad test suites

## Usage

```bash
agent-device test <path-or-glob>...
```

## Session Requirement

Creates or manages sessions internally.

## Aliases

- None

## Notes

- None

## Allowed Flags

- `--update, -u`: Replay: update selectors and rewrite replay file in place
- `--fail-fast`: Test: stop the suite after the first failing script
- `--timeout <ms>`: Test: maximum wall-clock time per script attempt
- `--retries <n>`: Test: retry each failed script up to n additional times
- `--artifacts-dir <path>`: Test: root directory for suite artifacts
- `--report-junit <path>`: Test: write a JUnit XML report for the replay suite

## Platform Coverage

_Capability checks are not defined for this command in `command-schema.ts`._
